commandsRun.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('/Users/trevor/code/CLIProxyAPIPlus/config.example.yaml').read_text()
for needle in ['name: "opencode-zen"', 'base-url: "https://opencode.ai/zen/v1"', 'api-key: "<OPENCODE_API_KEY>"', 'prefix: "zen"', 'alias: "zen-default"']:
    print(f'{needle}:', needle in text)
print('top-level opencode-api-key:', '\nopencode-api-key:' in text)
PY
commandsRun.observation: All required opencode-zen config fields were present; top-level opencode-api-key was false.

commandsRun.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import re
from pathlib import Path
paths = [Path('/Users/trevor/code/CLIProxyAPIPlus/README.md'), Path('/Users/trevor/code/CLIProxyAPIPlus/config.example.yaml')]
for p in paths:
    text = p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    vals = re.findall(r'(?i)(?:opencode[^\n]{0,80}(?:sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|[A-Za-z0-9_-]{32,})|(?:sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,})[^\n]{0,80}opencode)', text)
    print(p.name, 'secret-like matches:', len(vals))
    for v in vals[:5]: print(v)
PY
